title: チーム総合力アップ・温かい差し入れ

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hello there, Trainer. Your team has been working
so hard.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing special, but I brought a little present
for you all.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I hope the improved conditions will help with your
training. Good luck! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team is delighted by the thoughtful gift and
the clubroom upgrade, and our bonds grow
deeper!
